phase_history.notes: Rompler VST with custom .slr format (SF2/SFZ conversion), Visage C++ UI, matte black premium aesthetic
Phased implementation (5 sub-phases). SLR codec, 128-voice engine, FX chain, Visage UI, integration.
v1 UI spec (900x580), style guide, VisageControls.h, PluginEditor.h/.cpp generated. Brushed knobs, matte panels, envelope display, FX chain, preset browser.
All 5 sub-phases complete. SLR format (spec+parser+cache), 128-voice engine (ADSR+filter+LFO), FX chain (Reverb/Chorus/Delay), APVTS (40 params), PluginProcessor.h/.cpp, CMakeLists.txt.
GitHub Actions workflow updated (Solara added, APC_ENABLE_VISAGE=ON). Documentation, LICENSE, INSTALL.md created. dist/Solara-v1.0.0/ ready. slr-convert tool built.

framework_selection.rationale: User confirmed Visage. Hardware-aesthetic, brushed metal knobs, matte panels — all custom-drawn via visage::Frame. No web overhead.

concept_summary.genre: All-genre rompler (EDM, orchestral, lo-fi, pop, cinematic)
concept_summary.format: .slr custom compressed soundfont (FLAC blocks, converted from SF2/SFZ)
concept_summary.engine: 128-voice polyphonic, ADSR, multimode filter (LP12/LP24/HP/BP), LFO, Reverb/Chorus/Delay
concept_summary.aesthetic: Matte black / dark graphite, brushed metal knobs, soft gradients, clean typography
